workItem.title: Promote verified draft pull requests before policy-checked merge
workItem.body:
<!-- bos:work-item {"acceptanceCriteria":["A verified approved draft PR is promoted exactly once before merge","Restart after remote acceptance but before receipt recovers without duplicate mutation","A stale HEAD blocks without promoting or merging","The complete PR lifecycle reaches merge through bos-mcp only","Complete Symphony tests and recovery gates pass"],"autonomy":"full","context":"The delivery coordinator creates AgentRun PRs as drafts and later requests merge after evidence and approval, but it never promotes the draft. bos-orchestrator#7 therefore remained unmergeable despite exact-HEAD checks and approval. game-api#92 and the BOS MCP readiness tool provide the required domain operation.","dependencies":[6],"expectedOutcome":"After reviews and before merge, Symphony idempotently promotes the exact AgentRun PR to ready-for-review through bos-mcp, confirms the resulting PR state, and only then requests the policy-checked merge.","kind":"issue","operationId":"op_symphony_pr_ready_lifecycle_20260721","outOfScope":["Create a second PR","Bypass approval, evidence or checks","Use GitHub directly from Symphony"],"parentIssueNumber":null,"risk":"high","scope":["Insert PR readiness into the post-approval coordinator","Use the exact expected HEAD and existing AgentRun PR identity","Recover when the PR is already ready","Treat stale HEAD, closed PR and provider failures as distinct bounded states","Record readiness intent and confirmed outcome durably","Add restart and response-loss tests"],"status":"ready","title":"Promote verified draft pull requests before policy-checked merge"} -->

## Context

The delivery coordinator creates AgentRun PRs as drafts and later requests merge after evidence and approval, but it never promotes the draft. bos-orchestrator#7 therefore remained unmergeable despite exact-HEAD checks and approval. game-api#92 and the BOS MCP readiness tool provide the required domain operation.

## Expected outcome

After reviews and before merge, Symphony idempotently promotes the exact AgentRun PR to ready-for-review through bos-mcp, confirms the resulting PR state, and only then requests the policy-checked merge.

## Scope

- Insert PR readiness into the post-approval coordinator
- Use the exact expected HEAD and existing AgentRun PR identity
- Recover when the PR is already ready
- Treat stale HEAD, closed PR and provider failures as distinct bounded states
- Record readiness intent and confirmed outcome durably
- Add restart and response-loss tests

## Out of scope

- Create a second PR
- Bypass approval, evidence or checks
- Use GitHub directly from Symphony

## Acceptance criteria

- A verified approved draft PR is promoted exactly once before merge
- Restart after remote acceptance but before receipt recovers without duplicate mutation
- A stale HEAD blocks without promoting or merging
- The complete PR lifecycle reaches merge through bos-mcp only
- Complete Symphony tests and recovery gates pass
